programme.title: Magic of Disney's Animal Kingdom
programme.desc: Peri the porcupine is about to give birth to a fuzzy new baby; Anala, a Sumatran tiger, faces a series of challenging tests to keep her mentally and physically stimulated; Dugan, a southern white rhino, enjoys a birthday party.

programme.title: Magic of Disney's Animal Kingdom
programme.desc: Aardvarks Willie and Peanut go on a blind date that could ultimately produce the park's first-ever aardvark babies; a black rhino undergoes a blood draw; a massive Nile crocodile gets a checkup for his injured tail.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Magic of Disney's Animal Kingdom
programme.desc: Beth, Erin and Kerri introduce Linus, a male mandrill, to a family of female mandrills; Nicole has a soft spot for a stinky pair of hyenas with spotty reputations; Susan helps Sohni, an eight-year-old Sumatran tiger, face a challenge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Magic of Disney's Animal Kingdom
programme.desc: For the first time in the park's history, Hartmann's mountain zebras arrive on the savanna at Disney's Animal Kingdom; babirusa pig Betty is introduced to babirusa pig Mentari, with the hope they will give the park its first-ever babirusa piglet.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Magic of Disney's Animal Kingdom
programme.desc: Gino, a western lowland gorilla, celebrates his 39th birthday; Lori notices a lump on lioness Kinsey which requires medical attention; Amanda prepares to welcome a spotted eagle ray pup into the world; Katelyn teaches navigation skills to two macaws.
